headline: Public Hospital Wait Times Average 4.2 Hours in Emergency Departments
context: MOH data for 2025 shows average emergency department waiting time at government hospitals has risen to 4.2 hours.

cards.big: Emergency department wait times at public hospitals average 4.2 hours in 2025
cards.sub: Non-critical patients wait up to 8 hours during peak periods at major hospitals

cards.big: Malaysia has 1.5 doctors per 1,000 population versus WHO recommendation of 2.5
cards.sub: Doctor shortage directly drives longer wait times across all hospital departments

cards.big: Government hospitals handle 72% of all patient visits but receive 52% of health spending
cards.sub: Disproportionate demand relative to funding creates chronic resource strain

cards.big: Thailand reduced ER wait times 40% through nurse-led triage and primary care gatekeeping
cards.sub: System redesign addressing patient flow is more effective than adding beds alone

cards.big: Long waits are not a minor inconvenience—they delay treatment and cost lives
Should Malaysia implement mandatory primary care referral before hospital emergency access
